title: stor wors law qealetey
description: A star wars (?) resource pack that is purposely bad.
body:
# stor wors law qealetey

Ever wanted to use a resource pack made by an autistic person who made it purposely bad?  
Well today is your lucky day!

# What does it have?

Currently the swords, dirt, grass, beacon beam, title and the burning skull painting are retextured and most of them include our favorite man with a british accent, Obi-wan Kenobi.

# Hold on!

"stor wors law qealetey" only supports 1.19.4 and nothing else at the moment.
